item.title: CVE-2025-55182 - CVE-2025-55182 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
react2shell-scanner: 🔍 Detect vulnerabilities CVE-2025-55182 and CVE-2025-66478 in Next.js apps with this reliable command-line scanner.
CVE-2025-55182-research: 🛡️ Explore CVE-2025-55182, a critical RCE vulnerability in React's Flight Protocol, demonstrating exploitation techniques and mitigation strategies.
CVE-2025-55182-scanner: 🔍 Scan for CVE-2025-55182 risks in React Server Components with this non-intrusive tool that helps detect critical vulnerabilities in your applications.
CVE-2025-55182: 🚨 Exploit and scan for CVE-2025-55182, a critical React/Next.js vulnerability enabling remote code execution through prototype pollution techniques.
Blackash-CVE-2025-55182: 🚨 Identify and address CVE-2025-55182, a critical React Server vulnerability allowing remote code execution without authentication.
CVE-2025-55182-poc: 🚨 Demonstrate CVE-2025-55182, a critical React vulnerability allowing remote code execution via prototype chain pollution in `react-server-dom-webpack@19.0.0`.

cve-2025-8088: 🛠 Exploit CVE-2025-8088 with this Python tool to generate malicious WinRAR archives that ensure payload persistence in Windows startup folders.
